_note: Custom Voiceflow variables for the Sarah voice build. Built-ins last_utterance (=message), user_id (=contact id), last_response (=agent reply) replace the equivalent customs — do NOT recreate those. vf_ prefix is reserved by Voiceflow, so plumbing vars use fv_. If your Voiceflow importer expects CSV, the columns are: name,description,defaultValue.

variables.name: tenant_slug
variables.description: Tenant identifier. Set by vf-adapter (PATCH /variables) or this default for the voice-widget path.

variables.name: channel
variables.description: Normalised channel; 'web' for the voice widget. Set by vf-adapter, else this default.

variables.name: fv_system_text
variables.description: Flattened system prompt (layered prompts + contact context + retrieved-wine block) produced by the bootstrap Function. Wire into the Agent step's System field.

variables.name: fv_messages
variables.description: Supabase last-20 history + current turn, chronological, from bootstrap. Parity history (NOT vf_memory, which is session-scoped).

variables.name: fv_tenant_id
variables.description: Resolved tenant UUID from bootstrap. Used by every tool Function and by finalize logging.

variables.name: fv_retrieved_wine_ids
variables.description: Wine ids RAG returned this turn; logged in user-turn metadata; supports grounding checks.

variables.name: path
variables.description: Cost attribution tag written to conversations.metadata.path: 'widget' (live voice) or 'adapter' (harness probe).
